introduction: A young painter, in pursuit of his artistic dreams, joined Fei Tianma's studio but was forced to copy works attributed to the fictional European artist Lenka, producing counterfeit paintings for profit. Battling inner turmoil, he finally rebelled by burning his creations. However, this entire act turned out to be a conspiracy orchestrated by him and an AI, designed to successfully hype the fictional persona of Lenka. Ultimately, he gained moderate fame through a deconstructive artistic approach, yet his inner emptiness persisted.
